title: Yasi Word Record
description: A single word entry from the IELTS vocabulary PDFs (simplified schema — phonetic and examples omitted after smoke test observation).

spelling.description: The English word or phrase (e.g. 'atmosphere', 'carbon dioxide').

pos.description: Combined raw POS string from PDF (e.g. 'n./v.', 'adj.'). Optional.

glosses.description: One entry per POS group. Within a single POS, multiple Chinese meanings are joined with commas in `meaning`.

pos.description: Single POS marker ending with period, e.g. 'n.', 'v.', 'adj.'.

meaning.description: Comma-joined Chinese meanings, e.g. '大气层, 大气, 空气, 氛围'.
